## What you can do with this document  
  
You can get information about the hotel's general description, location, amenities, and facilities. You can also answer guest questions about policies (check-in/out, cancellation, pets, accessibility), pricing behavior and seasonality, and meeting or event spaces. Use the FAQ section to respond to specific guest queries.  
---  
  
# Hotel Description  
  
## Hotel General Description:  
The hotel is located in Belgium.  
	 - The hotel has a three-star rating.  
	 - It is a small-sized hotel with 45 rooms.  
  
## Hotel Extended Description:  
  
	-Property Name:  
	Chamade Hotel  
  
	-General description :  
	A charming boutique establishment located just 2 minutes from Ghent-Sint-Pieters Station, offering a warm and personal atmosphere. With a focus on sustainable hospitality, guests can enjoy fresh, locally sourced breakfasts and genuine service while being within walking distance of historic Ghent.  
  
	-Hotel features :  
	Its commitment to sustainability, being a certified green key hotel that prioritizes local and fair-trade products in its services.  
  
	-Cancellation policy :    
Until 3 pm the day before arrival with a standard rate. Non-refundable rates cannot be cancelled  
  
	-Parking information :  
	Yes, we have a limited number of parking spaces (€18/night). please reserve in advance by email, phone or whatsapp."   "underground hotel parking is available at eur 18 per night. reservations are recommended due to limited spaces."   "hotel chamade is not liable for damage to or theft from parked vehicles  
  
	-Restaurant information :    
From a lively breakfast to the softness of the bedding."   "we prepare fresh every day: eggs from our kitchen, fruit we cut ourselves, bread rolls baked each morning."   "only free-range eggs at our breakfast buffet."   "breakfast is served Monday to Friday from 7:00 am to 10:00 am, and on Saturday and Sunday from 8:00 am to 11:00 am  
  
	-Rooms information :  
	35m² · king-size 200×200 · bath or terrace 2 × 90cm beds · shower or bathtub queen-size 160×200 · shower or bathtub single bed 90×200 · walk-in shower discover the warmth of chamade, a place where every detail matters. from a lively breakfast to the softness of the bedding  
  
	-Family amenities information :  
	An extra bed is available at €25 per night. a cot is always free of charge. just let us know in advance so everything is ready on arrival  
  
  
  
## Hotel Location Information:  
The hotel is one of the nearest to sports halls Gebouw J, to museums Gents Universiteitsmuseum, Museum voor Schone Kunsten, S.M.A.K., to monuments Charles de Kerchove de Denterghem, to stations Gent Sint-Pieters, to train stations Gent-Sint-Pieters.  
	- The hotel is within walking distance of stations Gent Sint-Pieters,of train stations Gent-Sint-Pieters.  
	- The hotel is near to sports halls Gebouw J, to museums Stadsmuseum Gent, Gents Universiteitsmuseum, Museum voor Schone Kunsten, S.M.A.K., De Wereld van Kina, to monuments Charles de Kerchove de Denterghem.  
  
# Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)  
What is the official name of the property? The official name of the hotel is hotel chamade. [Related terms: property name, hotel title, establishment name]  
  
Where is hotel chamade located? hotel chamade is located at kon. elisabethlaan 3,gent,9000,belgium. [Related terms: address, directions, whereabouts, neighborhood, map location, surroundings]  
  
What is the official website of hotel chamade? You can visit the official website at https://www.chamade.be/. [Related terms: website, link, homepage, web address, online site]  
  
What are the check-in and check-out hours at hotel chamade? Check-in is available from 15:00 to 23:00. Check-out must be completed by 11:00. Early check-in is free and subject to availability. Late check-out may be possible until 13:00 if occupancy allows; please ask the evening before.. [Related terms: arrival time, departure time, check-in policy, check-out policy, front desk hours]  
  
What is the cancellation policy at hotel chamade? You can cancel for free until 3 pm the day before arrival with a standard rate. Non-refundable rates cannot be cancelled.. [Related terms: refund policy, booking cancellation, modify reservation, cancel rules, money back]  
  
Which payment options are accepted at hotel chamade? hotel chamade accepts the following payment methods: The hotel accepts the following payment options: bancontact, visa, mastercard, american express, ideal, and cash. Feel free to ask about options at booking or arrival.. [Related terms: credit cards, accepted cards, cash payment, methods of payment, visa, mastercard]  
  
Is smoking allowed at hotel chamade? Hotel Chamade is entirely smoke-free. Smoking is not permitted in rooms, hallways, or common areas. There is a designated smoking area at the exit.. [Related terms: smoking policy, non-smoking, designated smoking area, cigarettes, vaping]  
  
What is the damage policy at hotel chamade? The guest is liable for any damage to the hotel or room furnishings caused during the stay. A cost assessment will be made in mutual consultation. Payment is expected by credit card, payment request, or bank transfer.. [Related terms: deposit, breakage, fines, room damage, security deposit]  
  
Does hotel chamade have parking? Yes, hotel chamade offers parking. Yes, we have a limited number of parking spaces available at €18 per night. Please reserve in advance by email, phone, or WhatsApp. Public street parking is also available around the hotel from Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 7 PM, at a rate of €2.20 per hour.. [Related terms: car park, garage, valet parking, vehicle storage, parking lot]  
  
Is early check-in available at hotel chamade? Yes, early check-in is possible. Early check-in is free and subject to availability — just let us know when you'll arrive.. [Related terms: arrive early, morning check-in, flexible arrival]  
  
Is late check-out available at hotel chamade? Yes, late check-out is possible. Late check-out is possible until 1 pm if occupancy allows. Guests should ask the evening before for availability.. [Related terms: leave late, extended stay, afternoon departure]  
  
Does hotel chamade offer baggage storage? Yes, baggage storage is available. We store your luggage free of charge at reception.. [Related terms: luggage storage, leave bags, suitcase storage, cloakroom]  
  
What are the points of interest near hotel chamade? The hotel is near to sports halls Gebouw J, to museums Stadsmuseum Gent, Gents Universiteitsmuseum, Museum voor Schone Kunsten, S.M.A.K., De Wereld van Kina, to monuments Charles de Kerchove de Denterghem.. [Related terms: landmarks, tourist spots, monuments, must see places]  
  
Which languages are spoken by the staff at hotel chamade? The staff at hotel chamade speaks: The owner speaks English (UK), Dutch, and French.. [Related terms: multilingual staff, translators]  
  
Does hotel chamade have any seasonal closures? Yes, some facilities are subject to seasonal closure: The hotel will be renovating from February 8, 2026, to March 15, 2026. During this period, the elevator will be affected. The hotel will make every effort to minimize noise and disturbance during the renovations.. [Related terms: closed dates, off-season, winter closure, unavailable periods, seasonal availability]  
  
Does hotel chamade follow sustainability practices? Yes, hotel chamade has the following sustainability policies in place: Hotel Chamade in Ghent, Belgium, is committed to sustainability through various practices. The hotel holds a Green Key certification, reflecting its dedication to sustainable hospitality. It collaborates with local suppliers, such as vanier.gent, to source products from Ghent farmers, reducing delivery distances and supporting the local economy. The hotel also uses fair-trade products and cradle-to-cradle items in its bathrooms, ensuring complete recyclability. In 2024, Hotel Chamade underwent a full renovation, installing a new, energy-efficient HVAC system, switching all lighting to LED, and adding extra building insulation. The hotel purchases 100% renewable electricity and operates an electric delivery van charged exclusively with green electricity. Water conservation measures include installing aerator taps in 15 bathrooms. Waste is sorted into five streams in partnership with RENEWI. Additionally, the hotel supports reforestation projects by planting trees in Peru and Madagascar through Go Forest.. [Related terms: eco-friendly, green hotel, environmental policy, recycling, carbon footprint]  
  
Does hotel chamade have a garden or terrace? Yes, hotel chamade features a garden or terrace. Hotel Chamade offers a terrace where guests can relax.. [Related terms: courtyard, outdoor space, park, green area, patio]  
  
Is there a shared lounge or TV area at hotel chamade? Yes, hotel chamade has a shared lounge/TV area. Hotel Chamade in Ghent offers a shared lounge area for guests to relax and socialize. Additionally, the hotel features a lounge bar where guests can unwind with a drink.. [Related terms: common room, tv room, relaxation area, social space]  
  
Does hotel chamade offer fax and photocopying services? Yes, fax and photocopying services are available. Hotel Chamade in Ghent, Belgium, offers fax and photocopying services as part of its business facilities.. [Related terms: printing, copy machine, office services, scanning]  
  
Are bicycles available for rent at hotel chamade? Yes, bicycle rental is available. Hotel Chamade offers bicycle rentals to guests for a nominal fee.. [Related terms: bike hire, cycling, rent bikes, mountain bikes]  
  
Can I buy public transport tickets at hotel chamade? Yes, public transport tickets are available. Hotel Chamade offers public transport tickets to its guests.. [Related terms: bus tickets, metro pass, train tickets, transit card]  
  
Is there a bar at hotel chamade? Yes, there is a bar at the hotel. Hotel Chamade in Ghent offers a lounge bar for guests to relax and enjoy drinks. The bar area includes a lounge, providing a comfortable setting for guests.. [Related terms: cocktails, pub, drinks, lounge bar, wine bar]  
  
Does hotel chamade provide packed lunches? Yes, packed lunches are available. Hotel Chamade in Ghent offers packed lunches for guests.. [Related terms: picnic food, takeaway meal, boxed lunch, meal to go]  
  
Does hotel chamade offer special dietary options? Yes, special dietary options are available. Hotel Chamade offers a breakfast buffet prepared daily with fresh, local, and seasonal products. Guests are encouraged to inform the hotel of any allergies or intolerances, allowing the staff to accommodate special dietary needs.. [Related terms: gluten free, vegan, vegetarian, halal, kosher, allergies]  
  
Is daily housekeeping provided at hotel chamade? Yes, daily housekeeping is provided. Hotel Chamade in Ghent offers daily housekeeping services to ensure a comfortable stay for guests.. [Related terms: room cleaning, maid service, bed making, tidy up]  
  
Does hotel chamade offer laundry services? Yes, laundry services are available. Hotel Chamade in Ghent offers laundry and dry cleaning services for guests.. [Related terms: washing service, clothes washing, laundromat, self-service laundry]  
  
Does hotel chamade offer dry cleaning? Yes, dry cleaning services are available. Hotel Chamade in Ghent offers dry cleaning services for guests.. [Related terms: professional cleaning, suit cleaning, delicate garment cleaning]  
  
Are there security alarms at hotel chamade? Yes, security alarms are installed. Hotel Chamade in Ghent, Belgium, is equipped with a security alarm system, smoke detectors, and fire extinguishers to ensure guest safety.. [Related terms: burglar alarm, intruder alert, safety system]  
  
Does hotel chamade have smoke alarms? Yes, smoke alarms are installed. Hotel Chamade in Ghent, Belgium, is equipped with smoke detectors in its rooms, ensuring guest safety. Additionally, the hotel is entirely smoke-free, with smoking prohibited in rooms, hallways, and common areas. A cleaning fee of EUR 150 is charged for violations.. [Related terms: fire detection, smoke detectors, fire safety]  
  
Are there fire extinguishers at hotel chamade? Yes, fire extinguishers are available. Hotel Chamade in Ghent, Belgium, is equipped with fire extinguishers on the premises.. [Related terms: fire fighting equipment, safety equipment]  
  
Is there a safety deposit box at hotel chamade? Yes, a safety deposit box is available. Hotel Chamade offers safety deposit boxes for guests.. [Related terms: hotel safe, valuables storage, secure box]  
  
Is Wi-Fi available at hotel chamade? Yes, hotel chamade offers Wi-Fi. Hotel Chamade offers free Wi-Fi access to its guests.. [Related terms: internet access, wireless connection, high-speed net, online access, broadband]  
  
Do the rooms at hotel chamade have a TV? Yes, the rooms are equipped with a TV. Each guest room at Hotel Chamade is equipped with a flat-screen television offering satellite programming. Complimentary wireless Internet access is also provided, ensuring guests stay connected during their stay. The rooms are air-conditioned and include amenities such as safes and desks for added convenience. Bathrooms feature either bathtubs or showers, along with hair dryers and complimentary toiletries. The hotel offers various room types, including Comfort Single, Comfort Double, Comfort Twin, Comfort Triple, and Deluxe Double, each designed to cater to different guest needs. Additionally, the hotel emphasizes sustainability, being Green Key certified and offering a fresh daily breakfast prepared with local products.. [Related terms: television, cable TV, satellite channels, flat screen]  
  
Are baby cribs available at hotel chamade? Yes, baby cribs are available. Hotel Chamade provides baby cribs free of charge upon request. Guests are advised to inform the hotel in advance to ensure availability upon arrival.. [Related terms: cot, infant bed, baby bed]  
  
Is there a desk in the room at hotel chamade? Yes, the rooms are equipped with a desk. Each guest room at Hotel Chamade is equipped with a desk, providing a convenient workspace for guests.. [Related terms: work space, writing table, office desk, workstation]  
  
Do the rooms at hotel chamade have air conditioning? Yes, the rooms are air-conditioned. Hotel Chamade in Ghent, Belgium, offers air-conditioned guest rooms. The hotel provides 51 rooms, each equipped with air conditioning, complimentary Wi-Fi, and a multi-channel television. Additionally, the rooms feature tea and coffee making facilities, and spacious bathrooms with carpeted flooring.. [Related terms: AC, A/C, climate control, cooling, air con]  
  
Is there a safe box in the room at hotel chamade? Yes, the room is equipped with a safe box. Guestrooms at Hotel Chamade in Ghent are equipped with safes for secure storage of valuables. Additional amenities include air conditioning, flat-screen televisions with satellite programming, complimentary wireless Internet access, minibars, desks, and bathrooms featuring bathtubs or showers, hair dryers, and complimentary toiletries.. [Related terms: in-room safe, room security box, valuables locker]  
  
Do the bathrooms at hotel chamade have a walk-in shower? Yes, bathrooms feature a walk-in shower. The Comfort Single Room at Hotel Chamade features a walk-in shower. Other room types offer either a bath or a shower, but specific details about the shower type are not provided.. [Related terms: accessible shower, shower stall, rain shower]  
  
Do the rooms at hotel chamade have a balcony or terrace? Yes, rooms feature a balcony or terrace. Hotel Chamade in Ghent offers a Deluxe Double Room with Balcony, featuring a king-size bed and a private terrace with city views.. [Related terms: veranda, patio, outdoor deck, private balcony]  
  
Is a hairdryer provided at hotel chamade? Yes, a hairdryer is available in the room. Each guest room at Hotel Chamade in Ghent, Belgium, is equipped with a hairdryer, ensuring guests have access to this amenity during their stay.. [Related terms: blow dryer, hair dryer]  
  
Is there a lounge area at hotel chamade? Yes, a lounge area is available. Hotel Chamade in Ghent offers a lounge bar where guests can relax. The hotel also features a shared lounge area and various recreational opportunities.. [Related terms: sitting room, parlor, relaxation space]  
  
Is there a coffee/tea maker in the room at hotel chamade? Yes, a coffee/tea maker is provided. Hotel Chamade in Ghent, Belgium, offers guest rooms equipped with tea and coffee making facilities, including an electric kettle, coffee, and tea makers. Additionally, rooms feature air conditioning, complimentary Wi-Fi, multi-channel TV, and spacious bathrooms.. [Related terms: kettle, coffee machine, tea facilities, espresso machine]  
  
Is there a minibar in the room at hotel chamade? Yes, a minibar is available. Hotel Chamade offers air-conditioned rooms equipped with a minibar, providing guests with convenient in-room refreshments.. [Related terms: room fridge, drinks cabinet, snack bar in room]  
  
Do the rooms at hotel chamade have a city view? Yes, some rooms offer a city view. The Deluxe Double rooms at Hotel Chamade offer a city view. These rooms are approximately 35m² in size and feature a king-size bed (200x200), a bath or terrace, a separate (Japanese) toilet, a safe, a mini-bar, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a television.. [Related terms: urban view, skyline view, street view]  
  
Can you describe the rooms at hotel chamade? Hotel Chamade in Ghent offers a variety of rooms to accommodate different guest needs. The Deluxe Double Room, the largest at 35m², features a king-size bed (200×200) and includes either a bath or a terrace. The Comfort Triple Room is family-friendly, equipped with three single beds and a bath or shower. The Comfort Twin Room provides flexibility with two 90cm beds and options for a shower or bathtub. The Comfort Double Room is designed for two guests, offering a queen-size bed (160×200) and a shower or bathtub. For solo travelers, the Comfort Single Room includes a single bed (90×200) and a walk-in shower. All rooms are air-conditioned and come with complimentary Wi-Fi, a multi-channel TV, and spacious bathrooms. Some rooms also offer city views.. [Related terms: room details, accommodation types, suite features, room layout]  
  
Are there any restaurants near hotel chamade? Hotel Chamade is located near Ghent Sint-Pieters station and within walking distance of the historic center of Ghent. The hotel is situated in the Stationsbuurt Noord district, close to the 19th-century Citadelpark. Given its proximity to the city center and local attractions, there are likely numerous dining options available nearby.. [Related terms: local dining, places to eat nearby, food recommendations, nearby cafes]  
  
What local activities are available near hotel chamade? Hotel Chamade is conveniently located near Ghent-Sint-Pieters Station, providing easy access to various local attractions. Guests can visit the historic center of Ghent, including landmarks such as Gravensteen, Graslei, and Saint Bavo's Cathedral, which are a 20-minute walk or a 7-minute tram ride away. The hotel is also close to Veldstraat, Ghent's main shopping street, reachable within a 15-minute walk or a 7-minute tram ride. For nature enthusiasts, Citadelpark, Ghent's most beautiful city park featuring a pond, grottoes, and the Museum of Fine Arts (MSK), is just a 2-minute walk from the hotel. Additionally, the hotel offers the Gentse Citycard at reception, allowing guests to save over €20 on museums, tram rides, and most attractions.. [Related terms: things to do, sightseeing, excursions, attractions, events]  
  
What are the parking details at hotel chamade? Hotel Chamade offers an underground parking garage with 5 spaces for standard cars up to 1.75 meters in height, at a rate of €18 per night. Due to the limited number of spaces, reservations are required. Additionally, paid street parking is available around the hotel at €2.20 per hour from Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM, with free parking from 7:00 PM to 9:00 AM and on Sundays and public holidays. Alternatively, guests can park at the Gent-Sint-Pieters station's underground garage, located a 5-minute walk from the hotel.. [Related terms: parking cost, parking availability, valet price, public parking nearby]  
  
What public transport options are near hotel chamade? Hotel Chamade is located near Gent-Sint-Pieters railway station, providing convenient access to public transportation. Tram lines 1 and 3 quickly connect you to the city center or to Flanders Expo. Additionally, a tram stop is situated right outside the hotel, offering a quick route to Ghent’s center in 5 minutes. The hotel is also within walking distance of the historic center of Ghent.. [Related terms: nearest metro, bus stop, train station, getting around]  
  
Does the hotel have business centers, meeting rooms, or facilities for events? For professional needs, hotel chamade offers the following business facilities: Fax/Photocopying.

Are there any shared spaces, lounges, or public areas for guests to use? During your stay at hotel chamade, you have access to several common areas: Parking, Garden/Terraces, Shared lounge/TV Area.
